programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: With the pub shut, Chas feels like she is cut off from her old life, while Paddy is keen to get things back on track between them. Before long he has plans for them both, but will Chas allow him to carry her away with his dreams?(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Lockdown is a trial for Marlon who is living in another house due to plumbing issues while his kids are residing in other properties. Matters are made worse when he discovers Ellis has invited his father Al to live with them as he has nowhere else to go.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: A series of scandals makes for an interesting few days in the quiet village of St Mary Mead, and most seem to revolve around a blustering local colonel, whose brusque manner and short temper make him unpopular with his fellow villagers. When he is found dead with a bullet through the head, Miss Marple and the reluctant DI Slack investigate. Whodunit, starring Geraldine McEwan as Miss Marple, with Jane Asher, Jason Flemying, Derek Jacobi and Miriam Margolyes.(n)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A student production of The Merchant of Venice is halted when the actor playing Shylock is murdered during the performance. Lewis and Hathaway are struck by the lack of grief among the cast and crew - especially the ambitious director, who wastes no time recasting the role. The detectives discover the victim had an expensive lifestyle and not only owed money to his fellow students, but was also suspected of stealing from them. However, the investigation has barely got under way before the killer strikes again. Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox star.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Japp and Poirot investigate the murder of an actress's estranged husband, only to find in the theatrical world, where deception and play-acting are a way of life, nothing is quite what it seems. In time-honoured fashion, it initially looks as though the butler did it - but subsequent inquiries throw up a veritable rogues' gallery of equally likely suspects. Philip Jackson, David Suchet and Hugh Fraser star.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuth investigates her friend Elspeth McGillicuddy's claim to have witnessed a murder being committed on a passing train during a rail journey, but everyone is stumped by the lack of a body. Mystery, starring Geraldine McEwan, Pam Ferris, Niamh Cusack, John Hannah, Amanda Holden, Griff Rhys Jones, David Warner, Jenny Agutter and Rob Brydon.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A woman's body is discovered in Captain Hastings' garage on Bonfire Night. It transpires that the deceased was due to marry an MP - and although the evidence suggests suicide, the Belgian detective suspects foul play. David Suchet, Hugh Fraser and Philip Jackson star.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Coma victim Harriet Farmer finally wakes up a year after she was attacked while trying to elope, but her boyfriend Finn Robson is still missing. Soon after she regains consciousness, members of a chess club are targeted by a killer. Could the assault that left Harriet for dead be linked to moves on a games board? Guest starring Fay Ripley (Cold Feet), with Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes.(n)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The detective is faced with a difficult case when he investigates the discovery of a body in a well, and he also has to contend with a new boss, Chief Superintendent Moody, who is dubious as to Lewis' motivation for coming out of retirement. As investigations into the human remains in the well proceed, an avant-garde artist's body is also discovered and at first glance it looks like a tragic drugs overdose, but Hathaway and Lewis quickly recognise the tell tale signs of murder.(n)

programme.title: Deep Water
programme.desc: Traumatised from the attack, Roz makes her way home and finds a furious Joanne waiting for her. With no one else to confide in, Roz decides to tell Scott about Wayne, who promises to retrieve the footage. Meanwhile, Lisa finds Joe in a local bar and watches as he drinks and flirts with the barmaid. When she awakes the next morning and realises he has not come home, she fears the worst. With her daughter's return, Kate struggles to keep her web of lies intact. Starring Anna Friel, Sinead Keenan, Steven Cree and Gerald Kyd.(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A confrontation between hunt stewards and saboteurs leads to the suspicious death of a protester - and makes Jack wonder whether the thrill of the chase has given the horsey set a taste for human blood. Whodunit, starring David Jason as DI Frost, with Bruce Alexander, Sean Pertwee, Del Henney and Tat Whalley.(n)

programme.title: The Loch
programme.desc: Craig Petrie becomes a suspect in both murders, and Blake assists in questioning him. However, he quickly turns the tables on the police and casts doubt on Leighton's innocence. Annie investigates his claims further, and her loyalty to Leighton is shaken when she discovers his alibi is a lie. Smilie tries to comfort Jonjo's father, but is rejected.(n)

programme.title: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: Following the loss of their funding, the residents are in dire financial straits. Danny and Ed are refused an extension on their mortgage, and an attempt to solve the family's problems once and for all backfires dramatically. Later, Danny breaks news about his future that leaves Du Plessis devastated. African-set wildlife drama, starring Stephen Tompkinson, Robert Bathurst and Deon Stewardson.(n)

programme.title: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: Strange things are happening at Leopard's Den as Danny prepares to leave for the UK. Frogs have seemingly rained down overnight, the giraffe refuses to budge from the front gate and the cheetah has lost its appetite. Danny jumps at the chance to have one last adventure before his return home - tracking a lioness that attacked a tourist - but it could end in tragedy. Meanwhile, Du Plessis makes an alarming discovery about Ed and Fiona.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: English country squire Marcus Waverly receives a series of anonymous letters threatening to kidnap his son Johnnie, but the case is dismissed by Scotland Yard - prompting Poirot to open his own investigation. Drama, starring David Suchet and Geoffrey Bateman.(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: With the pub shut, Chas feels like she is cut off from her old life, while Paddy is keen to get things back on track between them. Before long he has plans for them both, but will Chas allow him to carry her away with his dreams?(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Lockdown is a trial for Marlon who is living in another house due to plumbing issues while his kids are residing in other properties. Matters are made worse when he discovers Ellis has invited his father Al to live with them as he has nowhere else to go.(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Curly recruits for an assistant manager and receives an application from Liz. Denise throws a party for Daniel's birthday and is put out when the Dunkleys arrive.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Denise tells Brian he cannot cope with their affair so she wants to end it. Ken is overwhelmed when Denise proposes marriage. Rita is touched when Sally offers an olive branch.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The Dingles worry that Zak may have fallen for the pig lady. Tina pushes Viv and Terry to give dancing lessons at the holiday village. Marcus attacks Scott.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Linda asks Zoe for a pay rise to fund her wedding. Dave is dismissive of Kim when she tries to contact him. Vic decides that Scott is signing up for the Army.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Dr Tricia Summerbee tries to get back to normal following her near-fatal heart attack, despite Mike's concerns that she has returned to work too soon. Elsewhere, Ventress investigates a murder in the village - and gets a shock when the prime suspect turns out to be a thief he certified dead more than 15 years earlier. Jason Durr, Clare Calbraith and William Simons star.(n)

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: A misunderstanding between Sid and Betty leads to chaos and confusion. Family comedy, starring Sid James and Diana Coupland.(n)

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: A death in the family causes problems for Sid. Comedy, starring Diana Coupland.(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Robin and his brother lock horns over Chrissy's affections, while Mr Roper tries his hand at chimney sweeping. Comedy, with Richard O'Sullivan.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The bell-ringers of Midsomer Wellow are mysteriously murdered one by one - and it seems an ancient rhyme may hold the key to the killer's motive. As Barnaby and Troy embark on a baffling investigation in an attempt to determine the truth, Joyce starts digging into the past to discover the assassin's motives. John Nettles, Daniel Casey and Hugh Bonneville star.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The village is plagued by a spate of burglaries, and the finger of suspicion points to a most unlikely perpetrator, revealing a heartbreaking tale of domestic abuse and family tragedy. Elsewhere, Vernon resolves to dig out his books on hypnotism and put an end to Gina's arachnophobia, but his early experiments on David leave his patient feeling rather peculiar, while Dennis and Jenny discover a mutual love of jazz.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jan is worried about being left alone in the house. Viv drowns her sorrows in the Woolpack. Dave bursts into Frank's office and demands to see Kim.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Steve offers Rachel a job as his assistant now Faye has left. Andy receives news about his grandma's death. Viv and Terry are given Vic's blessing to carry on with dancing lessons.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jack goes against Vera's wishes and lifts the ban on the Malletts. Tricia gets a letter from the courts but ignores it. Deirdre wishes Ken luck when she hears he is marrying Denise.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The Duckworths are annoyed to receive the Malletts' rewiring bill. Brian calls on Denise demanding to know why she has ended their affair. Vicky asks Fox to perjure himself.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A pupil at the prestigious Devington School dies of a stab wound while competing in a race in honour of his recently deceased grandfather. DCI Barnaby discovers the death could be linked to a long-running rivalry between the school and the locals - or to the youngster's membership of an elite club dedicated to dining on suet puddings. Mystery, starring John Nettles, Daniel Casey and Jane Wymark.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The village is plagued by a spate of burglaries, and the finger of suspicion points to a most unlikely perpetrator, revealing a heartbreaking tale of domestic abuse and family tragedy. Elsewhere, Vernon resolves to dig out his books on hypnotism and put an end to Gina's arachnophobia, but his early experiments on David leave his patient feeling rather peculiar, while Dennis and Jenny discover a mutual love of jazz.(n)

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Plans for Robert's birthday party are under way, but Rose's surprise contribution to the event ruffles feathers above and below stairs. Mary faces dramatic repercussions when a new farming venture is launched on the Downton estate, while Edith receives more unwelcome news. Hugh Bonneville, Lily James, Michelle Dockery and Laura Carmichael star in the costume drama.(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Morse investigates an assassination attempt at an international sporting event, but the case is very quickly closed. While Thursday is determined to walk away, Morse delves deeper, getting drawn into a web of intrigue involving espionage, big business and a dark secret in the heart of the Oxford community. Meanwhile, Thursday faces a moral dilemma as he tries to protect a woman from her violent husband.(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Michael Kitchen returns to the role of Christopher Foyle, senior intelligence officer for MI5, in the first of three films. Foyle is drawn into the world of corrupt Nazi businessmen when a university professor is found murdered in a London park. When it transpires the victim was working as a translator in Nuremberg, the detective realises there are powerful people trying to conceal secrets from the Second World War. Meanwhile, Sam (Honeysuckle Weeks) volunteers for a risky undercover job, despite being pregnant. Guest stars include John Mahoney (Frasier), Jaime Winstone (Mad Dogs) and Nigel Lindsay (Four Lions).(n)

programme.desc: A confrontation between hunt stewards and saboteurs leads to the suspicious death of a protester - and makes Jack wonder whether the thrill of the chase has given the horsey set a taste for human blood. Whodunit, starring David Jason as DI Frost, with Bruce Alexander, Sean Pertwee, Del Henney and Tat Whalley.(n)

programme.title: The Loch
programme.desc: Craig Petrie becomes a suspect in both murders, and Blake assists in questioning him. However, he quickly turns the tables on the police and casts doubt on Leighton's innocence. Annie investigates his claims further, and her loyalty to Leighton is shaken when she discovers his alibi is a lie. Smilie tries to comfort Jonjo's father, but is rejected.(n)

programme.title: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: Following the loss of their funding, the residents are in dire financial straits. Danny and Ed are refused an extension on their mortgage, and an attempt to solve the family's problems once and for all backfires dramatically. Later, Danny breaks news about his future that leaves Du Plessis devastated. African-set wildlife drama, starring Stephen Tompkinson, Robert Bathurst and Deon Stewardson.(n)

programme.title: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: Strange things are happening at Leopard's Den as Danny prepares to leave for the UK. Frogs have seemingly rained down overnight, the giraffe refuses to budge from the front gate and the cheetah has lost its appetite. Danny jumps at the chance to have one last adventure before his return home - tracking a lioness that attacked a tourist - but it could end in tragedy. Meanwhile, Du Plessis makes an alarming discovery about Ed and Fiona.(n)

programme.desc: With the pub shut, Chas feels like she is cut off from her old life, while Paddy is keen to get things back on track between them. Before long he has plans for them both, but will Chas allow him to carry her away with his dreams?(n)

programme.desc: Lockdown is a trial for Marlon who is living in another house due to plumbing issues while his kids are residing in other properties. Matters are made worse when he discovers Ellis has invited his father Al to live with them as he has nowhere else to go.(n)

When it transpires the victim was working as a translator in Nuremberg, the detective realises there are powerful people trying to conceal secrets from the Second World War. programme.title: Thomas Markle: Meghan & Me
programme.desc: Filmed at his home in Mexico in October 2019, this documentary follows Thomas Markle as he reveals the story behind his dramatic fall-out with daughter Meghan. Following the recent announcement that the Duke and Duchess of Sussex have chosen to step back as senior members of the royal family, Thomas gives his thoughts on their decision. Markle reveals his belief that there's a high likelihood he'll never see his daughter again, saying he misses 'the way that she was', and also claims he lied about a phone conversation with his daughter and son-in-law during a TV interview with Good Morning Britain's Piers Morgan.(n)

Turning their attention further afield, the stars share some of their most memorable holiday tales, including transforming a hotel corridor into one long 'slip-and-slide', the suspicious discovery of a pair of chicken fillets in a swimming pool in Marbella, and a blush-inducing incident involving a naked paragliding session along a Spanish beachfront.(n)

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House

Glaswegian Sammy has lived in Blackpool for 33 years, and now he runs the only caravan site in the town centre, while Blondie tribute artist Fiona moved to the resort with dreams of making it big in the music industry, but has to travel miles out of town to get gigs.(n)

programme.title: Top of the Box

The stars of Bread reflect on filming their Christmas special, Neighbours star Mark Little recalls how Australian soaps took British TV by storm, and Byker Grove star Lyndyann Barrass explores the year's best children's programmes. programme.title: Building Britain's Canals
programme.desc: Dan Jones examines Britain's most iconic canals, beginning with the 152-mile Grand Union Canal, which runs up the spine of the country. Constructed at the height of the Industrial Revolution, the task challenged even the greatest engineering minds of the time, including pioneers such as James Brindley, the man behind Britain's first commercial canal, and William Jessop, the person with whom responsibility lay for the building of the main link from Birmingham to London. Travelling along its route, Dan experiences first-hand the innovations behind its construction, including the Blisworth tunnel.(n)

programme.desc: The inquisitive four-year-olds meet a firefighter, and wonder what they can do to make sure they are prepared in the event of a fire.(n)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig erects a tent in the garden, so Peppa and her friends decide to stage a circus inside it.(n)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig takes Peppa and George to a fish pond that he used to visit when he was a piglet.(n)

programme.title: Ricky Zoom

programme.title: Paw Patrol

programme.title: Becca's Bunch

programme.title: Little Princess
programme.desc: After viewing photographs taken by King and Queen while they were on safari, the youngster decides to go on safari herself. Narrated by Julian Clary.(n)

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Cap'n Dilly makes the chicks into mini-pirates to retrieve the key to a sunken treasure chest.(n)

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: The bunnies must master footballing skills if they are to win the big trophy cup to put a giant ice cream in.(n)

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: The broadcaster and guests discuss the issues of the day, with co-host Storm Huntley joining him for phone-ins and reading out viewers' correspondence.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Steve have an emotional confrontation in Berkshire when a tearful woman accuses her landlord of fleecing her for extra rent, while Brian and Del travel to Luton to recover £4,500 owed by an elusive debtor who has been giving them the runaround.(n)

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world.(n)

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy wins $10,000 on the lottery, but things take a turn for the worse when the girls decide to put the ticket in a jacket pocket for safe keeping.(n)

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche's brother comes to town looking for love, but he does not tell his sister that he has been concentrating his search on men instead of women.(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: While Ryder keeps his father at arm's length, Roo learns the reason for Evan's return. Gemma acts as peacekeeper as Ari and Tane clash in their new home, and Alf and Martha return.(n)

programme.title: Neighbours

programme.title: A Killer in My Home (2020)
programme.desc: A woman is shocked when her husband confesses on his deathbed to having a second family. Six months later, his other wife and her teenage son turn up on her doorstep, determined to be a part of her life - and willing to go to murderous lengths to get what they want. Thriller, starring Bree Williamson and Hannah Vandenbygaart.(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey appears on quiz show The $100,000 Pyramid, but his disastrous efforts to answer the questions end up costing his partner the prize money. Meanwhile, the revellers at Phoebe's hen party get a surprise once the stripper shows up. Guest starring Danny DeVito and Donny Osmond.(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe's big day arrives, but wedding planner Monica and stand-in father of the bride Joey take their roles a little too seriously. To make matters worse, a blizzard hits New York and one of Mike's ushers is indisposed, forcing Ross and Chandler to step into the breach.(n)

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world.(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Aaron decides to write a letter of complaint about the intrusive questions at the fostering interview, while Dee is befriended by a prison guard, unaware he has a secret agenda.(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: While Ryder keeps his father at arm's length, Roo learns the reason for Evan's return. Gemma acts as peacekeeper as Ari and Tane clash in their new home, and Alf and Martha return.(n)

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories.(n)

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Bill Nighy narrates a trip through Wales' highest peaks and deepest valleys. Starting in Pwllheli in the north west, the route heads along the lines that were built during the slate industry's heyday. At Porthmadog, the journey briefly switches to the reconstructed steam trains of the Welsh Highland National Heritage Railway to Minffordd station. Nearby is the village of Portmeirion, famous for its role in the classic TV series The Prisoner. Rejoining the Cambrian Line, local farmers reveal what the railway means to them, before the route takes in the seaside resort of Aberdovey.(n)

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Dog handler Darren has to call on all his powers of persuasion to try to end a rooftop stand-off, while Steve is forced to use his pepper spray when a suspect refuses to come quietly, and Tasers are drawn in a tense situation with a man who is armed with a knife.(n)

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: Medical staff are faced with an aggressive patient who was brought in by police after being pushed down a flight of concrete stairs, and is shouting and swearing. Doctors are concerned that his behaviour could be as a result of a serious head injury. Doctor Andrew administers morphine to help a woman in agony, but the medics grow worried when her screams turn to silence.(n)

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Decluttering experts Caz and Tee set out to help Plymouth pensioner Arthur, whose two-bedroom flat is packed with piles of junk he cannot bear to throw away. A carpet of newspapers covers every inch of the floor and as a result, family and friends have stopped visiting. This might just be the duo's toughest assignment yet. Meanwhile, Khim Sim is getting married to her fiancé Jim, but first she must clear her hoard so he can move in, and in London, Mandi's passion for vintage clothes is out of control.(n)

programme.title: Big Body Squad
programme.desc: Documentary about dangerously obese people and the care and support they receive from their families, carers and even the emergency services. This episode focuses on people with a range of obesity-related conditions, which cost the NHS billions of pounds each year, as an ambulance crew battle to get a plus-sized patient out of her home.(n)

programme.title: Ice Age: The Meltdown (2006)
programme.desc: Sid the sloth, Manny the mammoth and Diego the sabre-toothed tiger grimly realise the good life is about to come to an abrupt end as flood waters threaten their homes. However, a vulture suggests they could turn an old giant tree into a boat and make their escape, so the three friends set off in search of it. Animated adventure sequel, with the voices of Ray Romano, John Leguizamo and Denis Leary.(n)

programme.title: Rugrats in Paris: The Movie (2000)
programme.desc: The lucky little tots embark on a trip to a French theme park - but while the rest of the gang are intent on enjoying themselves, Chuckie is distracted by his wish for a new mum. He sets his sights on the owner of the amusement park as a prospective partner for his single dad. Animated adventure, with the voices of Christine Cavanaugh, Elizabeth Daily, Cheryl Chase, Kath Soucie and Susan Sarandon.(n)

programme.title: Ever After: A Cinderella Story (1998)
programme.desc: A girl grows up in 16th-century Europe under the iron fist of her stepmother, until the love of handsome Prince Henry offers a glimmer of hope. Unfortunately, the royal gent has worries of his own in the shape of an arranged marriage. Luckily, Renaissance genius Leonardo da Vinci is on hand to play fairy godfather and bring the pair together. Romantic drama, starring Drew Barrymore, Anjelica Huston, Dougray Scott and Timothy West.(n)

programme.title: Back to the Future (1985)
programme.desc: Teenager Marty McFly travels back to the 1950s in a time machine built by his eccentric inventor friend. The return journey proves tricky enough, but he also accidentally alters the sequence of events that led to his parents falling in love - and has to persuade his future dad to win his mother's heart, or he will never be born. Sci-fi comedy adventure, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson and Crispin Glover.(n)

programme.title: Behind Enemy Lines (2001)
programme.desc: A reconnaissance pilot is shot down and becomes stranded in enemy territory after filming evidence of a genocidal massacre by Serb militia in Bosnia. The naval air commander for Nato forces in the Balkans defies orders by mounting an unauthorised mission to rescue him, while the airman faces a battle to stay alive as he is pursued by paramilitary forces. Bosnian War drama, starring Gene Hackman, Owen Wilson, Gabriel Macht and Olek Krupa.(n)

programme.title: A Good Day to Die Hard (2013)
programme.desc: John McClane goes to Russia having received word that his estranged son Jack is in trouble with the law. He is surprised to discover Jack is secretly a CIA agent, and father and son join forces to take on the Russian Mob, who are engaged in a plot to steal nuclear weapons. Action adventure sequel, starring Bruce Willis and Jai Courtney.(n)

programme.title: The Strangers: Prey at Night (2018)
programme.desc: Ten years after events of the first film, in a secluded Ohio trailer park, three masked strangers, Dollface, Pin-Up Girl, and the Man in the Mask, terrorise a family. Slasher horror sequel, starring Bailee Madison, Lewis Pullman and Christina Hendricks.(n)

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: The Marked Ones (2014)
programme.desc: A teenager investigates the murder of a neighbour, which leads him to discover evidence of black magic. He begins to experience strange and disturbing changes and realises he may be succumbing to a sinister curse placed on him by a coven of witches and their demonic allies. Horror sequel, starring Andrew Jacobs and Jorge Diaz.(n)

programme.title: Love Is Strange (2014)
programme.desc: Two middle-aged gay men who have been living together for years finally tie the knot. Instead of living happily ever after, their marriage is put to the test when one of them loses his teaching job, forcing them to downsize their apartment and find a new place to live - a task that proves to be easier said than done. Drama, starring Alfred Molina and John Lithgow.(n)

programme.title: The Return of the Musketeers (1989)
programme.desc: D'Artagnan reunites his former companions to save the queen of France from the scheming Cardinal Mazarin, and embark on a mission to England to prevent the beheading of Charles I. Meanwhile, the daughter of a former vanquished enemy is seeking revenge on the four heroes. Swashbuckling adventure sequel, with Oliver Reed, Michael York, Frank Finlay, Richard Chamberlain, Kim Cattrall and Roy Kinnear, who died during filming.(n)

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water (2015)
programme.desc: The cheery sea creature tries to prevent a precious secret formula from falling into the wrong hands - but when it goes missing, the end of the world approaches. SpongeBob and his friends embark on a quest to get it back, which leads to them developing superpowers and venturing onto dry land. Animated comedy, with the voices of Tom Kenny and Antonio Banderas.(n)

programme.title: Back to the Future Part II (1989)
programme.desc: Time-travelling teenager Marty McFly travels to the 21st century, where he has to save his children from a terrible fate. However, this proves to have unforeseen consequences when the future version of arch enemy Biff sees a chance to rewrite history for his own benefit, leaving Marty stuck in a twisted parallel universe. Sci-fi comedy sequel, starring Michael J Fox and Christopher Lloyd.(n)

programme.title: 12 Years a Slave Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Steve McQueen and actor Chiwetel Ejiofor discuss working together on the period drama.(n)

programme.title: Big Eyes (2014)
programme.desc: Aspiring painter Margaret Keane marries a controlling man who sells her artwork. As the paintings of large-eyed children grow tremendously popular, Margaret discovers he is claiming to have painted them himself, and she and her daughter are forced to live a lie for years - until she finally resolves to prove his deceit in court. Tim Burton's fact-based drama, starring Amy Adams, Christoph Waltz and Terence Stamp.(n)

programme.title: Table 19 (2017)
programme.desc: Dumped by the best man via text, a former maid of honour decides to pitch up at her friend's wedding anyway. Comedy, starring Anna Kendrick, Craig Robinson and Lisa Kudrow.(n)

programme.title: 12 Years a Slave Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Steve McQueen and actor Chiwetel Ejiofor discuss working together on the period drama.(n)

programme.title: Atomic Blonde (2017)
programme.desc: MI6 operative Lorraine Broughton is sent to Berlin before the fall of the wall to investigate the murder of a fellow spy and recover a missing list of double agents. The city is in a dangerously unstable state, and she finds herself targetted by multiple factions plotting to exploit the uncertain future for their own ruthless ends. Thriller, starring Charlize Theron, James McAvoy and John Goodman.(n)

programme.title: How to Lose Friends & Alienate People (2008)
programme.desc: A self-promoting writer is offered a position on the staff of a New York fashion magazine thanks to his irreverent views on the world of celebrity. However, he soon discovers his opinions render him incapable of relating to the superficial personalities he is expected to work with, not to mention his egotistical boss. Comedy based on Toby Young's memoirs, starring Simon Pegg, Kirsten Dunst, Jeff Bridges, Megan Fox and Gillian Anderson.(n)

programme.title: Scribe (2016)
programme.desc: A recovering alcoholic finds himself at the centre of a political conspiracy after he accepts a shady job transcribing calls from tapped phones. Thriller, starring Francois Cluzet, Denis Podalydes and Sami Bouajila. In French.(n)

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: Documentary that follows the Deafinitely Theatre as it translates A Midsummer Night's Dream into BSL and prepares for a career defining performance at Shakespeare's Globe.(n)

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter (1971)
programme.desc: A slick conman tries to pass his dim-witted sidekick off as a notorious gunslinger as a way of profiting from a dispute between rival companies in a small mining town. Comedy Western, starring James Garner, Jack Elam, Suzanne Pleshette, Harry Morgan and Chuck Connors.(n)

programme.title: Sink the Bismarck! (1960)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama, charting the mission to track down and eliminate the pride of the German fleet, a fearsome battleship devastating British vessels in the North Atlantic, orchestrated by a British naval officer recovering from his wife's death in an air raid. Starring Kenneth More, Dana Wynter, Laurence Naismith and Karel Stepanek.(n)

programme.title: Run for Cover (1955)
programme.desc: An honest gunfighter is released from prison after serving time for a crime he did not commit and soon befriends a young upstart. When the older man is appointed sheriff of a nearby town, he insists that his protege is made deputy - but soon discovers his loyalty is misplaced. Western, directed by Nicholas Ray and starring James Cagney, John Derek, Viveca Lindfors and Jean Hersholt.(n)

programme.title: The Enemy Below (1957)
programme.desc: The captain of an American destroyer in the South Atlantic is still recovering from the sinking of his previous vessel. He tries to outwit a cunning German U-boat commander, but comes to respect the courage of his enemy. However, his crew fears he is not up to the challenge of defeating his opponent. Second World War thriller, starring Robert Mitchum, Curt Jurgens, Theodore Bikel and David Hedison.(n)

programme.title: Romancing the Stone (1984)
programme.desc: A romantic novelist goes in search of her kidnapped sister in the steamy jungles of South America, only to become the target of a villainous general who demands as a ransom the valuable treasure map in her possession. Help is at hand in the form of a craggy daredevil fortune hunter, who has his eye on a share of the profits. Comedy adventure, starring Michael Douglas, Kathleen Turner and Danny DeVito.(n)

programme.title: 12 Years a Slave Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Steve McQueen and actor Chiwetel Ejiofor discuss working together on the period drama.(n)

programme.title: 12 Years a Slave (2013)
programme.desc: A free black man living in pre-Civil War New York is abducted and sold into slavery. He spends the next 12 years struggling to survive and maintain his dignity in the face of brutal treatment, while clinging to a desperate hope that he can return to his family. Oscar-winning historical drama based on Solomon Northup's autobiographical book, starring Chiwetel Ejiofor, Michael Fassbender, Benedict Cumberbatch, Lupita Nyong'o and Brad Pitt.(n)

programme.title: Shame (2011)
programme.desc: A sex addict has carefully structured his life around his compulsion, constantly pursuing one-night stands and keeping everyone at arm's length emotionally. When his equally troubled sister turns up unexpectedly, he is forced to face up to his demons as his world starts to unravel. Steve McQueen's drama, starring Michael Fassbender and Carey Mulligan.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he heads for West Babylon, New York, where he helped the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts, before returning to Davide in Boston, an Italian restaurant run by two warring brothers. Finally, he visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island, run by hot-headed owner Abby.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits four restaurants he earlier tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or fell by the wayside. First he visits the Spanish Pavillion in New Jersey, then heads to California to see the owners of Kingston Cafe, French-themed La Frite, and Capri.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Bride-to-be Jenna could be in for a scary surprise as her fiance Nathan is planning a Mexican day of the dead themed wedding for their big day.(n)

programme.title: Baby's Day Out (1994)
programme.desc: Three bungling kidnappers hatch a plan to pose as society reporters and snatch the baby son of a wealthy couple. However, the infant escapes on to the streets of New York, evading the crooks' every attempt to recapture him. Comedy, starring Joe Mantegna, Lara Flynn Boyle, Joe Pantoliano and Brian Haley.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica and Lainey try to set Lainey's father Bill up with a 'woman of interest' by using new video dating technology. They recruit Adam to make a showreel about Bill, but Beverly insists she will find him someone to date in the old-fashioned way. Barry decides he wants to be a gym teacher and starts to act as Coach Mellor's apprentice. David Koechner and Allie Grant guest star.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam risks bodily harm during an intense game of paintball to impress his latest crush. Erica pretends she has a college-aged boyfriend, but is embarrassed when her friends see right through her deception. Murray's stubborn behaviour causes Beverly to miss seeing the Beach Boys at Live Aid.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt invites the entire squad to his house to celebrate his birthday, but Jeffords struggles to keep everyone in line, with Peralta and Santiago making a bad impression on their host's husband Kevin. Meanwhile, Boyle's love of food leads to a romantic connection with an older woman, and Diaz introduces Gina to some psychologists - who find her to be a fascinating subject.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta is in danger of losing his flat but has no money to buy his own place, so Gina does her best to find him a new home. Holt and Jeffords organise self-evaluations for all the staff at the precinct, while Boyle helps Diaz to take revenge on one of the weekend squad officers who always makes a mess of her desk.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to set a new record on a training course, Diaz does not receive an invitation to Boyle's wedding, and Holt becomes addicted to a game application on his smartphone. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle asks Peralta to be his best man, but as well as helping out with cake-tasting and choosing invitations, he must also persuade the groom to start standing up to Vivian before the big day. Holt helps Diaz make a sincere apology and Jeffords, Santiago and Gina embark on a tough new diet - but struggle to stick to it.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta takes part in an undercover FBI operation that ends in a mass arrest. But when one of the mobsters escapes he enlists Boyle's help in tracking him down. Captain Holt tests the squad's patience with practice drills in which Sgt Jeffords plays different roles, while Gina pleads with Boyle to keep a secret. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher.(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: When the young genius learns that people with stunted childhoods can turn into social outcasts, he tries to act like a stereotypical child. Meemaw and Dr Sturgis' relationship is tested when she teaches him how to drive.(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Missy unknowingly becomes Sheldon's test subject when he agrees to help her with her maths homework, while Georgie joins Mary's bible study group to spend more time with a girl he has his eye on.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends fight over a ring they believe was used in the Lord of the Rings film trilogy. Leonard hopes to return the item to its rightful owner - but Raj wishes to sell it so he can buy a jet ski, and Sheldon develops a Gollum-like obsession with the precious object.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is awarded a prestigious prize by the university, but is scared of collecting the gong at a ceremony because he knows he'll have to give a speech. Penny tries to gee him up with rousing references to X-Men, and Leonard and Raj offer psychological guidance - without much success.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tells Penny he loves her, but fails to get the response he would have liked. Sheldon also finds himself competing against Star Trek: The Next Generation actor Wil Wheaton once again when the gang goes bowling - and tries to get his revenge.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to hide the fact he had dinner with Penny after she broke up with Leonard, hoping to stay friends with her. However, keeping secrets does not prove to be his strong point, and it isn't long before his deceit is exposed. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon invites a famous physicist to the flat after befriending her online, but is put out to find Leonard showing an interest in her. Meanwhile, Penny has to confront her ex-boyfriend when the visitor turns up in his bedroom. Guest starring Judy Greer (Glenn Martin, DDS).(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The comedy flashes back to reveal how Sheldon saved the lives of his pals, and looks at the origins of his friendship with Leonard seven years previously, as well as explaining the housemates' agreement. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is upset after Lucy runs away in the middle of their date, leaving the gang to cheer him up. However, when Howard bumps into her, she admits she is incredibly shy. Meanwhile, Sheldon asks Penny to help with a new episode of Fun with Flags, and because he is impressed by her acting ability, the friends go to see her in a performance of A Streetcar Named Desire.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While the girls go to Disneyland and get made up as princesses, the guys have to promote science as a career option for women at Howard's old middle school. Meanwhile, Raj and Lucy have their first date in a library, where instead of speaking to each other they send text messages.(n)

programme.title: Puss in Boots (2011)
programme.desc: The swashbuckling feline joins forces with a cunning thief and a treacherous old friend to steal a magical golden goose from a giant's castle. He must save the day when it transpires that their actions have unleashed a terrible danger on his home town. Animated comedy spin-off from the Shrek movies, with the voices of Antonio Banderas and Salma Hayek.(n)

programme.title: The Wolverine (2013)
programme.desc: The former member of the X-Men is lured out of hiding and travels to Japan, where a dying businessman offers him the chance to give up his immortality for a normal life. He ends up robbed of his superhuman powers by a mysterious scientist and is forced to protect the tycoon's granddaughter from a secret conspiracy's assassins. Superhero adventure spin-off, starring Hugh Jackman and Tao Okamoto.(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics check out The Wine Show, All Together Now, Troy: Fall of a City, Theresa May's appearance on This Morning, 24 Hours in Police Custody, 24 Hours in A&E, The Job Interview and the News. From February 2018.(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The popular armchair critics share their opinions on what they watched during the final week of February 2017, including Mary Berry Everyday, The Nightly Show, The Secret Life of the Zoo, Little Big Shots, Incredible Medicine, The Secret Chef and the Oscars.(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Croydon mates Josh and Jack take part in a double date, but problems arise after they meet Morgan and Jasmine, and both fall for the same girl. Meanwhile, divorced mum-of-two Sandy hopes to find romance with an astrology expert Steve, though incompatible star signs may be a problem. And tomboy boat-builder Abbey returns to the restaurant, but will she find a soul mate in Eddie, an odd job man who's nervous around women?(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Singletons Jack and Kim, who both enjoy the high life, arrive at the restaurant, while East Ender Terry and hairdresser Levana share a funny and unforgettable date, as they muse on Towie and the merits of keeping an emergency bottle of wine in your wardrobe. Plus, 47-year-old Maria meets 49-year-old pilot and fellow divorcee Paul.(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics check out The Wine Show, All Together Now, Troy: Fall of a City, Theresa May's appearance on This Morning, 24 Hours in Police Custody, 24 Hours in A&E, The Job Interview and the News. From February 2018.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Bride-to-be Jenna could be in for a scary surprise as her fiance Nathan is planning a Mexican day of the dead themed wedding for their big day.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Salem falls for a college girl, while Sabrina throws a Hallowe'en party - where Roxie jeopardises the relationship between Frankenstein's monster and his gruesome bride. Supernatural sitcom, starring Melissa Joan Hart.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part edition, Gordon Ramsay heads to La Galleria 33 in Boston, Massachusetts, an Italian restaurant run by sisters Rita and Lisa. The pair grew up working at their father's eatery nearby, but when they opened their own business, they couldn't replicate his success, and they now blame their failure on everything from the weather to the tablecloths.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Reece, who is ex-military, plans an army-themed wedding with a twist. However, his fiancee Lucy has dreams of getting married in a castle. It therefore remains to be seen whether he will win her over with his military manoeuvres - or instead receive his marching orders.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Jonny plans an adrenaline-fuelled wedding for his bride-to-be Kate, who has always dreamed of a simple, sophisticated reception.(n)

programme.title: The Spiderwick Chronicles (2008)
programme.desc: Life for identical twins Jared and Simon and their sister Mallory begins afresh when their mother inherits a spooky mansion. But after moving in, strange things begin to happen, and as the youngsters investigate, they discover a book that opens up a mysterious world of amazing supernatural creatures. Fantasy adventure, starring Freddie Highmore in a dual role alongside Sarah Bolger and Nick Nolte.(n)

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos, featuring the effects of dental anaesthetics.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After getting telephone answering machines, Murray and Pop-Pop wage a message war on one another, so Erica, Barry and Pops try to reunite them at a hockey game.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to be a horror writer, but his efforts get him grounded on Halloween when Beverly discovers that she is the basis for the monster in his story. Erica forces Barry to attend a costume dance with her.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta enlists Jeffords to help him tackle a cold case that everyone thinks is unsolvable. Meanwhile, Santiago plans a romantic weekend away with her new boyfriend Teddy, and Gina and Diaz tell Boyle one of their best-kept secrets. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Melissa Fumero.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta suspects a civic leader of money laundering, but his investigation is shut down by the police commissioner. Determined to crack the case, he enlists Santiago and Holt to help uncover more evidence - and risks suspension as a result. Boyle is devastated when Vivian ends their relationship, so his colleagues try to cheer him up.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj and Howard register Sheldon with an online dating site hoping to find his perfect female equivalent. Meanwhile, a drunk Penny seduces Leonard, but regrets it the next day. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco. Mayim Bialik (Blossom) makes her first appearance on the show.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is stunned when Sheldon announces he is about to go on his first-ever date, and is even more surprised to find herself tagging along. Meanwhile, Leonard and Raj take a trip to the hospital after Howard's new robotic arm creates problems.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to extend his lifespan, concerned he will not be around long enough for his consciousness to be downloaded into a robot body, and the friends encounter Apple co-founder Steve Wozniak (guest starring as himself) at the Cheesecake Factory.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon breaks up with Amy and turns to cats in his search for an alternative to human companionship. However, when he starts to bulk-buy pets, Leonard decides enough is enough and calls for reinforcements to help bring his friend back to his senses. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: An embarrassing secret from Howard's past comes to light as he tries to win back Bernadette, while Sheldon and Raj engage in a battle of wills when they have to work in the same office. Guest starring Katee Sackhoff and George Takei.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is depressed that everyone seems to be paired off except him, and resorts to desperate measures to get a girlfriend. Meanwhile, Sheldon looks for a way out of his relationship with Amy, who wants him to meet her mother. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette and Howard host a dinner party, but as it falls on Sheldon's Thai food night, he opts to bring his own dinner. As punishment for his lack of manners, the gang decides he should organise Wolowitz's cluttered wardrobe, but he discovers an unopened letter from Howard's father, who hasn't made contact in years.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys compete for a tenured professor position at the university, leading them to try to win over the committee in charge of appointing a new staff member, and arguing about who deserves the spot the most. However, the panel includes Mrs Davis from Human Resources, whom Sheldon has crossed paths with before. Guest starring Regina King.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy tries to help Sheldon get over his desire for closure when one of his favourite TV shows is cancelled on a cliffhanger ending. Raj discovers his new girlfriend Lucy has a blog in which she has written about him, and is upset when he learns she believes he has feminine qualities, causing him to worry about their relationship.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon discover their favourite childhood TV science show host Professor Proton can be booked for private parties and decide to hire him to entertain them. Meanwhile, Raj asks Howard and Bernadette to look after his dog for the weekend, but the couple panic when the canine goes missing. Guest starring Bob Newhart.(n)

programme.title: Night at the Museum: Secret of the Tomb (2014)
programme.desc: Nightwatchman Larry notices that the living exhibits of his museum are behaving strangely. He discovers that the magical artefact that brings them to life is damaged, so he and his friends travel to London's Natural History Museum to find a way to restore it. Fantasy comedy sequel, starring Ben Stiller, Rebel Wilson and Robin Williams in his final film role.(n)

programme.title: Batwoman
programme.desc: More of Alice's dark past is uncovered when Cartwright shares a twisted story with Kate, while Jacob goes searching for his wayward daughter.(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Zoe from London is confident but is finding it hard to meet someone who will embrace her sass and body hair. Derry from Wigan says his jet-set lifestyle is getting in the way of finding someone to settle down with. Anna Richardson invites them both to choose a date from a selection of six naked people, whose bodies are revealed one section at a time.(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Edinburgh musician Jamie says he is fed up of attracting groupies and wants more than a brief fling. Twenty-year-old musical theatre student Jasmin from Bognor Regis has been diagnosed with the chronic fatigue illness ME and wants to meet someone who will accept her for who she is. Anna Richardson invites them both to choose a date from a selection of six naked people, whose bodies are revealed one section at a time.(n)

programme.title: Supernatural
programme.desc: Sam and Dean enlist the help of Rowena to track down a demi-god who feasts on human flesh, while the challenge of keeping Michael at bay proves more difficult than anticipated.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj's sister Priya visits the gang, causing tension when Leonard tries to cover up the fling he once had with her. After discovering his friend's secret, Sheldon struggles to keep quiet, leading the guys to reveal information they have all been keeping from one another.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard vows to be more self-assured around women, believing his problem attracting a girlfriend stems from a lack of confidence. An FBI agent interviews the gang to assess Howard's suitability for a team working on a new surveillance satellite. Guest starring Eliza Dushku.(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's favourite opinionated TV viewers share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the week's biggest and best shows, including The Voice, Mutiny. Mastermind, The Replacement, Five Gold Rings, Top Gear and the news. First broadcast in March 2017.(n)

programme.title: Batwoman
programme.desc: More of Alice's dark past is uncovered when Cartwright shares a twisted story with Kate, while Jacob goes searching for his wayward daughter.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Jonny plans an adrenaline-fuelled wedding for his bride-to-be Kate, who has always dreamed of a simple, sophisticated reception.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: New Yorker Ted Mosby begins to fear he will never find love, and decides to embark on a quest to find a woman he can share his life with. He thinks he may have discovered her when he strikes up a rapport with TV reporter Robin Scherbatsky in a bar - but his overenthusiasm proves to be a serious stumbling block. Pilot episode of the sitcom, starring Josh Radnor, Alyson Hannigan, Jason Segel, Neil Patrick Harris and Cobie Smulders.(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted throws a party in an attempt to land a second date with Robin, but she fails to show up - so he resolves to keep arranging more get-togethers until she finally attends one. American comedy, starring Josh Radnor and Cobie Smulders.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: The school charity auction takes place and Mel urges Joe to participate, but when he does it seems as though the winner has ulterior motives for volunteering. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel feels the pressure to be in a relationship when her last single friend gets engaged, and decides to go on a date with a man who is dull - but Joe teases her about finding someone more interesting. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: While looking for a new bar manager, Ben interviews his old crush Sam, and decides to exact 'Ben-geance' on her for never noticing him in high school. But once Ben sees Sam again, his plan to make her believe she got the job and then take it from her unravels. Bonnie realises marrying Brad means he's always going to be around, causing her to reconsider their union.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Thinking Tucker needs to stand up for himself with his boss Mary Hart, Ben films Mary berating Tucker to show how badly he's being treated, but when Emma accidentally uploads the video online, Mary and Tucker become a viral sensation - leaving Tucker in an even worse spot than before. Riley asks Danny to stand up to Bonnie and tell her she can't always hang out with them, but Bonnie has a trick up her sleeve to outwit Riley.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon becomes concerned that his comfortable lifestyle is having an impact on his professional progress and is stopping him from achieving scientific greatness, so he asks the gang to make life more difficult for him. Meanwhile, Howard invents an unflattering game about Raj. Starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon are forced to defend themselves against criticism from an online bully after publishing a physics paper. Meanwhile, the girls confront embarrassing moments from their pasts during a night in. Comedy, guest starring Stephen Hawking, with Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam sets out to create a sequel to Raiders of the Lost Ark as he admires director Steven Spielberg so much that he has written an original script about Indiana Jones, but his passion for directing is challenged in the process. Barry bets Murray he knows where to find the best cheesesteak sandwich ever, so they drive to New Jersey to settle the issue.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Beverly catches a glimpse of her soon-to-be empty nest, she replaces her children with the Mellor brothers, nursing Coach Mellor back to health after he falls off the rope climbing equipment. Meanwhile, Erica and her college room-mate get on each other's nerves.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago are excited to go on their first real holiday together, but their perfectly planned cruise ship itinerary is thwarted when they discover that an old adversary is on board. Boyle and Diaz vie for the same apartment, while Gina and Jeffords help Captain Holt to survive a visit from his sister Debbie.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: On his birthday, Peralta takes Santiago to meet his mother, but an unexpected appearance by his father spoils his special day. Diaz and Boyle struggle with a new mandate on body cams while on a stakeout with Jeffords, while Gina forgets to inform the precinct when Captain Holt comes up with an important plan. Katey Sagal and Bradley Whitford guest star.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny tries to put a stop to Leonard's plan to be a sperm donor for her ex-boyfriend Zack's wife. Howard, Bernadette, Anu and Raj make the most of the latter's cancelled stag party.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When the friends find out that Wil Wheaton is hosting a celebrity game of Dungeons & Dragons at his home, deception and betrayal become the order of the day as they compete to occupy the one open seat at the event. With guest appearance by William Shatner, Kareem Abdul-Jabbar and Kevin Smith.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Lennox plans to go to an all-night party with her boyfriend, and Mel is initially relaxed about the outing. However, she soon becomes anxious so Joe decides to follow the youngster and keep an eye on her. Elsewhere, Holly grows jealous when she and Ryder allow another girl into their study group. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: The duo are faced with a difficult dilemma when Joe comes into money, while a small leak in the ceiling grows into a huge problem for Mel. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben admits he never graduated from high school and decides to go back and finish his education to set a good example for Emma. Bonnie confesses that she didn't graduate either, so mother and son study to pass a final exam to get their diplomas. Riley and Sam are both inducted into their old school's athletic hall of fame, but argue over prime territory in the trophy case.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Bonnie is less than thrilled when she finds out that Ben invited her estranged mother Nana Lyle to town for Emma's nursery school family weekend, and tensions are soon running high.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Officers at the precinct drop everything to intervene when they suspect that Captain Holt is in danger after their efforts to track down Adrian Pimento's hitman take an unexpected turn. Dennis Haysbert guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part one of three. Peralta and Holt must adjust to their new lives in the Witness Protection Programme while crime boss Jimmy 'The Butcher' Figgis is still at large, but their anonymity could be compromised if a video of them goes viral. Rhea Perlman and Maya Rudolph guest star.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica thinks that all her singing dreams are about to come true when she lands a job at the new karaoke bar in town. However, when she is tasked with bringing in more customers, she is forced to ask Beverly for help. Meanwhile, Murray tries to teach Barry and Lainey how to be financially responsible adults. Rick Springfield guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam tells Beverly that he doesn't want her to chaperone the school trip to a theme park, his mother attempts to manipulate him with 'guilt letters'. After attending a career night, Geoff realises he doesn't want to be an eye doctor like his father.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Pilot episode of the comedy about scientists and their friendship with a down-to-earth neighbour. When aspiring actress Penny moves into Leonard's apartment block, he is immediately smitten, but Sheldon warns him that he runs the risk of a broken heart if he tries to woo her. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon helps Leonard drop off a parcel for Penny, but when he sees how messy her flat is, he tries to do a good deed - which is not well received. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Cheryl's nerves are proving too much and she is not sure she can go through with the ceremony, while Susan is surprised by her groom Sean, who arrives on horseback.(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners Movie (2011)
programme.desc: Awkward teenagers Simon, Will, Jay and Neil plan a holiday to the Greek island of Crete after they finish their exams, hoping to experience drink, sex and debauchery beyond their wildest dreams. However, things do not quite work out as planned. Comedy based on the TV series, with Joe Thomas, Simon Bird, James Buckley and Blake Harrison.(n)

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Part one of two. Spike obtains a magic artefact that could restore Drusilla to full strength - and to stop Buffy from interfering with his plans, he recruits an order of mystical assassins to hunt down and kill her. Meanwhile, Willow is recruited by a leading software company, along with Oz, the boy who has been watching her for weeks.(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home.(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: The team members select some of their favourite investigations from the show. Putting plums, prunes and prune juice to the test, Jimmy Doherty heads to King's College London to make a concoction that will help keep people's bowel movements regular. Kate Quilton visits Vietnam to learn about the difference between black and white pepper, and discovers the remarkable lengths to which producers go to guard their valuable crop from thieves, while Matt Tebbutt is in Switzerland to find out why there are holes in Swiss cheese.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Angie and Sandy from Nottingham are approaching retirement and looking for a place where they can spend quality time together. They've decided the sunshine of the southern Costa Blanca is the perfect place to do just that, so Ben Hillman shows them five properties for their £75,000 budget.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Recently retired Alan and Jackie Patrick from Hampshire are keen to buy a property on the north of Spain's Costa Blanca in the Marina Alta region, close to where Jackie's brothers live. Ben Hillman show them a range of properties for their £85,000 budget, but will any character town houses have them reaching for their chequebook?(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Farzana Kausar from Stockport, Greater Manchester, is looking for a better quality of life in the Spanish sun. Her daughter Aisha, who uses a wheelchair, is also making the full-time move. With a budget of £120,000 for the property and any alterations they'll need to make for Aisha, Laura Hamilton shows them five homes around Torrevieja on the Costa Blanca.(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps a couple looking for a home in Warrington, who do not seem to be able to agree on the best approach to house hunting, which has led to six months with no progress. In Liverpool, Phil Spencer comes to the aid of a successful entrepreneur looking for a house in Crosby, but who has very specific ideas.(n)

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Liam Charles and Tom Allen set two more challenges to the five remaining teams. Firstly, they must produce 24 perfect and identical layered vegetable cake slices and tomato shaped desserts in just three and a half hours. In the second stage, they must make baskets out of 160 choux buns, which are then filled with everything you might find at an allotment - but all made from sugar. Benoit Blin and Cherish Finden are on hand to assess the results and decide which teams go through to the next round.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Taxi driver Nik Christides hosts the first party in east Hampshire, where one guest causes a stir by revealing details of a romantic encounter with Boyzone singer Ronan Keating. Later, Nik introduces his diners to the sport of Cheesy Darts, which requires one guest to smear their face with cream, before having cheese-flavoured crisps thrown at them.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mother-of-four Jax Naudi hosts the second dinner party in east Hampshire, but her theme for the evening causes confusion and leads to one guest wearing an inappropriate outfit. Although Sue Hood expresses her distaste for the host's menu by remaining silent throughout the meal, the mood improves when Jax reveals the evening's entertainment - life drawing with a nude model.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Natalie Edemska-Plant hosts the third dinner party in east Hampshire, and plans to serve dishes from her childhood to give her guests an authentic Russian dining experience. She begins the evening with traditional customs such as banning shoes inside the house, and although her food is not a complete success, the night ends on a high note with some energetic dancing.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: History fanatic Kyle Curtis hosts the fourth dinner party from east Hampshire. A self-confessed novice in the kitchen, he decides to get his guests to help him with his main course - a fish fondue - and his choice of dress code for the evening proves a hit.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Sue Hood hosts the final night of the culinary competition in east Hampshire, hoping to impress her guests with a Caribbean-themed dinner party. The evening kicks off with the diners taking turns hitting a pinata, followed by entertainment in the form of dancers before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at Wizards Thatch in Alderley Edge, a village in Cheshire. Owners Ian Lambert and his partner Ali Imiolek hope to cast a spell over the competition, but their guests end up picking out problems with the continental breakfast basket.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to Blackpool, where James Reay and Simon Dooley run the one-star Winterbourne Hotel and Theatre Showbar. The contestants seem to be relaxed and impressed, but a rival's feedback sends one of the hosts storming out of the room.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Perfectionist Andrea Hickmott and her partner Nick Bonner-Williams welcome their guests to Northrise Lodge in Hastings, East Susses, but the rooms are criticised and deemed too clinical to relax in. Andrea also panics when she forgets to put sugar on the tables at breakfast.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Stephanie and Dominic Parker (who would go on to find fame in Gogglebox) welcome the rest of the contestants to their B&B, the Salutation in Sandwich, Kent. However, an alcohol-fuelled evening of parlour games jeopardises the hosts' chances to win the prize.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. A wedding proposal appears to be on the cards, and the winner is announced.(n)

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: High up on Dartmoor, shepherds Steve and Crispin Alford gather their sheep for a speed-shearing competition. It's a big day for Steve, as it's the first time he's hosted the annual charity event on his farm. In east Devon, master wheelwrights Greg and Mike Rowland embark on a new commission - building a gun carriage to sit aboard the HMS Warrior, while on the south coast of Cornwall, foraging chef Greg Milne wanders the woodland in search of inspiration for a new dish to serve at his restaurant on St Michael's Mount.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cameras follow 54-year-old Richard, who arrives at St George's hospital suffering symptoms of a suspected stroke. Meanwhile, 76-year-old Peter turns up in A&E with a severe head injury, covered in blood, but it's not clear what happened to him.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode focuses on the chances people take in life and whether a gamble ever pays off. 20-year-old Megan is rushed to St George's hospital after being involved in a high speed car crash, and as doctors begin treatment and work to assess her injuries, it soon becomes clear how her hedonistic lifestyle has put her at risk. Meanwhile, James, who's 78, is transferred from his local hospital with suspected internal bleeding, and 40-year-old Jibraeel has lodged a cotton bud in his ear.(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Key striker Father Jack drinks himself into oblivion just as the Craggy Island clerics are about to play a vital five-a-side football match against their Rugged Island rivals, led by devious Dick Byrne. Dermot Morgan stars.(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Cheating in the football match backfires on Ted, prompting his Rugged Island rivals to think up a devilish forfeit - and leaving the priest trying to contrive a way of kicking Bishop Brennan's backside and getting away with it. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon.(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz, with team captain Sean Lock and Johnny Vegas taking on guest captain Alan Carr and Lou Sanders. Lexicographer Susie Dent is joined by the Brett Domino Trio to adjudicate in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cameras follow 54-year-old Richard, who arrives at St George's hospital suffering symptoms of a suspected stroke. Meanwhile, 76-year-old Peter turns up in A&E with a severe head injury, covered in blood, but it's not clear what happened to him.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

Meanwhile, James, who's 78, is transferred from his local hospital with suspected internal bleeding, and 40-year-old Jibraeel has lodged a cotton bud in his ear.(n)
